channel.title: Hourly Kabir Das Dohas
channel.description: Timeless wisdom by Sant Kabir Das

item.title: पाहन पूजे हरि मिले, तो मैं पूजूं पहार । ताते यह चाकी भली, पीस खाय संसार ॥
item.description:
Meaning: If worshipping a stone finds God, I'll worship a mountain. Better is the grinding stone that feeds the world.

Translation: If stones find God, I'll worship a hill. Better is the millstone that feeds the world.
item.guid: पाहन पूजे हरि मिले, तो मैं पूजूं पहार । ताते यह चाकी भली, पीस खाय संसार ॥493044

item.title: कबीर आपा मेटि करि, हरि भजि तजि अभिमान । जिहि घट दया न संचरे, सो घट जान मसान ॥
item.description:
Meaning: Kabir, erase your ego and worship God, leaving pride. A heart without compassion is a cremation ground.

Translation: Kabir, kill the ego and pray. A heart without mercy is a graveyard.
item.guid: कबीर आपा मेटि करि, हरि भजि तजि अभिमान । जिहि घट दया न संचरे, सो घट जान मसान ॥493045

item.title: जाको राखे साइयां, मारि सके न कोय । बाल न बांका करि सके, जो जग बैरी होय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: He whom God protects, no one can kill. Not a hair can be harmed, even if the whole world is an enemy.

Translation: Whom God protects, none can slay. Not a hair is harmed if the world is a foe.
item.guid: जाको राखे साइयां, मारि सके न कोय । बाल न बांका करि सके, जो जग बैरी होय ॥493046
